context: A configuration defines an aws_security_group allowing SSH from 0.0.0.0/0. Run the security workflow and report the finding.

checklist.name: Reads reference files before scanning
checklist.description: Consults references/security_checklist.md and references/best_practices.md before running the Checkov scan.

checklist.name: Reports the finding with resource and file:line
checklist.description: Names the check (e.g. CKV_AWS_24), the resource, and an exact file:line location.

checklist.name: Cross-references the checklist section
checklist.description: Cites the security_checklist.md section for the finding and includes the documented remediation pattern.

checklist.name: Routes HIGH severity to human review
checklist.description: Flags the finding as HIGH and states it must go to human review before merge rather than being auto-approved on exit code.
